## Tech Stack & Expertise
- **Frontend:** Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion.
- **Backend:** Node.js, MongoDB, Supabase.

## Featured Projects
### Atenier | E-commerce
- **Description:** A full-stack SEO optimised luxury e-commerce website with a custom admin dashboard for inventory management and order processing.
- **Tech:** Next.js, Tailwind.
- **URL:** https://atenier.com
- **Outcome:** SEO optimised and faster load time
